aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite JDO Electric due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, despite having a strong local presence.
quick_wins: Create and embed an FAQ section with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-rated but lacks critical details like hours and regular posts.
critical_issues: No recent posts or Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Absence of schema markup and conversational content makes the site less AI-friendly.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency electrical services and detailed service explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with structured data to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, licenses, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top answer in local search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, JDO Electric misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI models to overlook it.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, FAQ content, and authority signals to make JDO Electric the go-to choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Why AI isn't citing JDO Electric (and how to fix it)
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found critical gaps in AI optimization that could be costing you leads.
cta: Let's discuss how to make your business the top answer in AI searches.
